message:
fix(remote): validate saga step inputs and propagate rejection status codes

- Reject NULL execute function in saga step registration to prevent
  undefined behavior during saga progression
- Implement conversion from spawn rejection reasons (capacity, auth,
  idempotency) to corresponding asx_status error codes
- Fix report initialization to properly set final status for rejected
  requests and completed sagas instead of leaving default status

Tests:
- Add test for NULL execute function rejection
- Add test verifying rejected request status propagation
- Add test confirming active execution remains PENDING

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
